product: Databricks Asset Bundles is now Declarative Automation Bundles
tagline: Databricks Asset Bundles has been renamed to Declarative Automation Bundles.
what_it_does: Databricks Asset Bundles has been renamed to Declarative Automation Bundles. This article lists frequently asked questions about Declarative Automation Bundles (formerly known as Databricks Asset Bundles). Why was Databricks Asset Bundles renamed to Declarative Automation Bundles?
why_it_matters: Use bundle templates for consistent structure, to reduce setup errors, and to promote best practices.
key_takeaway: Databricks Asset Bundles has been renamed to Declarative Automation Bundles.
